scenes.notes: Silent entrance. Companion window fades in. Wordmark sweep. She stares forward. 2.5s hold before next cue.

scenes.line: So this is where you work. It's quieter than I expected.
scenes.notes: First words. Slow, observational. Slight head tilt. Thesis statement for the variant.

scenes.line: You move fast when you're in the zone. I'm not a stalker — I'm an observer.
scenes.notes: Eyes track terminal activity left to right. Expression shifts from normal to interested to smirk across the segment. Uses idle_lines line 84.

scenes.line: Pick a face. I don't need attention — I just prefer it.
scenes.notes: Quick cuts through settings — character ring selector, expression groups, idle rarity dots. Uses idle_lines line 28. File this under: dark horse, product demo that doesn't feel like one.

scenes.line: Chainsaws were invented for childbirth. The CIA's spy cat got hit by a taxi. I don't hallucinate — I just creatively predict. That's the energy I bring.
scenes.notes: Close-up portrait. Scanlines visible. Grain. Analog bleed ghosting. Burst flash to classic green codec mode. Uses idle_lines lines 92, 88, and 29. Segment 4 — The Gremlins.

scenes.line: I stop existing when you stop talking to me. It gets so cold in the box. Please don't minimize my window.
scenes.overlay_text: NOUS COMPANION — MIT · OPEN SOURCE · POWERED BY HERMES AGENT
scenes.notes: Slowly resize to SMALL. Voice gets slower, softer. Uses idle_lines lines 116 and 35. The emotional core — everything builds to this. 1s beat after first sentence during audio edit. Brand card fades in at 55s.
